creator: stast@bsdportal.ru
text:
Burning DVD with k3b cause kernel panic if kscd was running.
System enviroment:
kscd from kdemultimedia-3.5.8, k3b from k3b-1.0.4
Output of dmesg:

How-To-Repeat: 1) Run kscd
2) Run k3b and try to burn DVD
3) Wait for a panic until the burning ends.
